parameters.jsCode:
const root = $json;
function arr(x){return Array.isArray(x)?x:(x?[x]:[]);}const statuses = arr(root.DescribeInstanceStatusResponse?.instanceStatusSet?.item);const out=[];for(const s of statuses){out.push({ instanceId: s.instanceId || '', systemStatus: s.systemStatus?.status || '', instanceStatus: s.instanceStatus?.status || '', details: s.instanceStatus?.details || '', operation: 'health_check' });}return out.length?out:[{note:'No status found', operation:'health_check'}];

const resp = $json.GetConsoleOutputResponse || $json;const out = []; if (resp && resp.instanceId) { out.push({ instanceId: resp.instanceId, output: resp.output || resp.consoleOutput || '', operation: 'console_output' }); } else if (resp && resp.output) { out.push({ instanceId: $json.instanceId || '', output: resp.output, operation: 'console_output' }); } else { out.push({ note: 'No console output found', operation: 'console_output' }); } return out;

const resp = $json.AssociateAddressResponse || $json; if (resp && resp.return === 'true') { return [{ json: { note: `Associated IP ${$json.extra?.publicIp} to ${ Array.isArray($json.instanceId) ? $json.instanceId.join(',') : $json.instanceId }`, operation: 'associate_address' } }]; } return [{ json: { note: 'AssociateAddress not confirmed', operation: 'associate_address' } }];

const resp = $json.CreateImageResponse || $json; if (resp && resp.imageId) { return [{ json: { note: `Created AMI ${resp.imageId}`, imageId: resp.imageId, operation: 'create_image' } }]; } if (resp && resp.requestId) { return [{ json: { note: 'CreateImage requested', requestId: resp.requestId, operation: 'create_image' } }]; } return [{ json: { note: 'CreateImage response not recognized', operation: 'create_image' } }];
